title: How to Play ZXSpace
seoTitle: How to Play ZXSpace | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn how to defend your cities, destroy alien waves, collect power-ups, and survive longer in ZXSpace.
summary: Protect your cities, destroy alien formations, and survive increasingly challenging waves of attackers.

sections.heading: Your Mission
paragraphs: Protect your cities from invading alien forces by moving your cannon across the bottom of the screen and destroying every enemy before they break through your defences.
Your mission ends when all your lives are lost or your cities have been destroyed.

sections.heading: How a Game Works
paragraphs: Each game begins with a fresh wave of invading aliens. Destroy every enemy to move on to the next wave while protecting your shields and cities from incoming attacks.
Every completed wave rewards you with BarkinMad Coins and prepares you for an even greater challenge.
bullets: Move the cannon by dragging left and right.
Let auto-fire destroy the alien formation.
Watch for UFOs and power-up drops.

sections.heading: Scoring and Waves
paragraphs: Different alien types award different score values, encouraging you to eliminate the most valuable targets whenever you have the opportunity.
Surviving longer, completing more waves, and defeating bonus UFOs will all help you achieve higher scores.

sections.heading: Power-Ups
paragraphs: Power-ups give you temporary advantages that can help you survive difficult situations and protect your cities.
Current power-ups include Double Laser for increased firepower and Shield Repair to restore damaged defences.

images.caption: Protect your cities and survive every alien wave.

featureShowcases.heading: Defend Your First City
featureShowcases.summary: Everything you need to begin playing ZXSpace with confidence.
body: ZXSpace combines fast-paced arcade shooting with strategic city defence. Learn how to position your cannon, destroy alien waves, protect your shields, and make the most of every power-up.
As your confidence grows, you'll unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and climb the leaderboards while defending more cities.

image.caption: Everything you need to begin defending your first city.
